name: AI Agent — Jira Ticket Ingestion (Embed + Index)
_description: Fetches Jira tickets, builds embed text with edge case handling, generates OpenAI embeddings, upserts into Supabase pgvector. Run manually or on schedule.

parameters.body: ={{ JSON.stringify({ticket_id: $('Build Embed Text').item.json.ticket_id, title: $('Build Embed Text').item.json.title, description: $('Build Embed Text').item.json.description, status: $('Build Embed Text').item.json.status, url: $('Build Embed Text').item.json.url, embedding: JSON.stringify($json.data[0].embedding)}) }}
